hooks.command: cd '/Users/mbp2018/Documents/VS Code/real-paper-trading-sim' && LINT_OUT=$(pnpm run lint --quiet 2>&1); LINT_EXIT=$?; TSC_OUT=$(pnpm run type-check 2>&1); TSC_EXIT=$?; if [ $LINT_EXIT -ne 0 ] || [ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '=== ARCHITECTURE GUARDIAN: REJECT ==='; [ $LINT_EXIT -ne 0 ] && echo "Lint: $(echo "$LINT_OUT" | head -8)"; [ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ] && echo "Types: $(echo "$TSC_OUT" | head -8)"; fi
